'''wachala''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wunderkind|wunderkind]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ch-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wunderkind|wunderkind]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| wachala
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wæchælæth|wæchælæth]] || [[word:wæchælæj|wæchælæj]] || [[word:wæchælæsh|wæchælæsh]] || [[word:wæchælæ|wæchælæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wachachalath|wachachalath]] || [[word:wachachalaj|wachachalaj]] || [[word:wachachalash|wachachalash]] || [[word:wachachala|wachachala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wachalath|wachalath]] || [[word:wachalaj|wachalaj]] || [[word:wachalash|wachalash]] || [[word:wachala|wachala]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wachaflath|wachaflath]] || [[word:wachaflaj|wachaflaj]] || [[word:wachaflash|wachaflash]] || [[word:wachaflaf|wachaflaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wachalatha|wachalatha]] || [[word:wachalaja|wachalaja]] || [[word:wachalasha|wachalasha]] || [[word:wachalaka|wachalaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wachalath|wachalath]] || [[word:wachalaj|wachalaj]] || [[word:wachalash|wachalash]] || [[word:wachala|wachala]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wachalathal|wachalathal]] || [[word:wachalajal|wachalajal]] || [[word:wachalashal|wachalashal]] || [[word:wachalakal|wachalakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wachalathatha|wachalathatha]] || [[word:wachalajaja|wachalajaja]] || [[word:wachalashasha|wachalashasha]] || [[word:wachalaka|wachalaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wachalathan|wachalathan]] || [[word:wachalajan|wachalajan]] || [[word:wachalashan|wachalashan]] || [[word:wachalakan|wachalakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wachalathaoro|wachalathaoro]] || [[word:wachalajaoro|wachalajaoro]] || [[word:wachalashaoro|wachalashaoro]] || [[word:wachalakaoro|wachalakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
